race.comment: Former Victorian LOWESTOFT (6) is having her first run for the new stable but showed ability when last in work and should find this easier than what she faced down south. Has placed two from two when first-up and is sure to run a big race while fresh. UPSTART LOVER (9) returned in good order with a solid Ipswich victory and gets some weight off from the inside alley. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. ROYAL BOMBADIER (1) was a touch disappointing last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Worth another chance. DEEP TIARA (12) placed around this circuit when resuming and will have come on with that run now in the locker. In the mix. PUREZZA (4) next best with the claim.
